title: Bitter Flaky Jamaican Aubergine Crumble
description: A midnight craving dish featuring bitter aubergines poached in a flavorful blend of spices and served with a flaky nut-free crumble topping.

ingredients.name: Preparation of crumble topping ingredients not listed here as optional

instructions: Peel and chop the aubergine into small cubes.
Slice the onion thinly and sauté in the oil until translucent.
Add chopped garlic to the onions, cook for another minute.
Add all spices (ground allspice, cayenne pepper, vanilla extract) and mix well.
Add coconut milk and caster sugar. Stir till sugar dissolves.
Place aubergine cubes on top of the mixture in a pan. Adjust heat to maintain a low simmer and cook for 20 minutes or until aubergines are soft but not falling apart.
For crumble topping, mix together optional ingredients as per recipe (this part is left blank).
